identity.name: VPShopDZ Design System
identity.description: A modern, RTL-first design system for the Algerian e-commerce market, blending Shopify's power with local accessibility.

core_principles: Trust & Clarity: Emerald Green (#10b981) as the anchor for trust and growth.
Local First: RTL native, Tajawal font for Arabic legibility.
Mobile Priority: 80% of Algerian traffic is mobile. Touch targets > 44px.
Visual Hierarchy: High contrast for data, soft shadows for depth.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (Clean, Trustworthy). Dark Mode optional for Dashboard.

font_family.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

grid_system.storefront_products: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-700 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium
buttons.danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors duration-200

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.product: group relative bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: block w-full rounded-lg border-gray-300 bg-gray-50 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-emerald-500 sm:text-sm py-2.5 px-3
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1

badges.success: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800
badges.error: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-red-100 text-red-800

assets.icons: Heroicons (Outline for UI, Solid for Active states)

laravel_blade.icons: Copy SVG directly or use blade-heroicons package if available

universal_guidelines: Ensure 'dir=rtl' is set on the html tag.
Use 'gap-4' or 'gap-6' for grid layouts to maintain breathing room.
Avoid pure black (#000000); use Gray-900 (#111827) instead.
Interactive elements must have a hover state.
For the Storefront, prioritize mobile view (stack columns on mobile).
Use 'emerald-600' for primary actions to build brand recognition.
